reasoning: The customer claims the package was never delivered. While the order status is 'Complete', internal notes identify Lisa Anderson as a VIP customer with a high lifetime value ($6,200) and low refund rate. Crucially, the notes indicate a recommendation to approve as an exception because the company delayed responding to her initial contact, which caused the request to fall outside the standard policy window. To maintain the VIP relationship and rectify the internal delay, the refund is approved.
